name: app-it-static
description: Turn a finished or buildable web app into a macOS Dock-launchable .app that serves the built output — no dev server, ~15 MB instead of 700 MB.

interface.shortDescription: Make a finished/buildable web app launchable from the Dock — serves the build, no dev server.
interface.longDescription: App It (Static) is the lightweight companion to App It. For finished or buildable apps, it serves the built output (dist/, build/, out/, ...) from a tiny static server or directly via file:// — no dev server, no bundler in memory. A finished app costs ~15 MB of RAM instead of the 300-700 MB a dev server holds. Reuses App It's native WebKit window, icon pipeline, and one-folder Dock install.
defaultPrompt: Use app-it-static to make this finished build launchable from the Dock.
Serve this app's built output as a local macOS app without a dev server.
Package this static site as a lightweight local macOS .app.
